_comment: Ambient / wandering noble rolls (AmbientNobleManager). One once-per-in-game-day roll per player: if they carry gateTag, are inside area (2D column around center, any Y), past the per-player cooldownDays latch (scoreboard noble_roam_<id>), and not already in a noble/Cobblemon battle, roll dailyChance -> NobleEncounterManager.start. The noble's OWN noble_encounters/<id>.json arena.center decides where it materialises: birds have a FIXED town arena (spawn there); roamers omit arena.center so start() spawns at the player's feet. Tune dailyChance/cooldownDays/radius per taste (ModMenu-free; edit + rebuild, or /reload the datapack in dev). area.center is [x,y,z] but only x/z are used.

rolls._comment: Moltres ALWAYS attacks Scorchspire after the HQ raid (proximity event, showrunner 2026-07-17): while you're in the area and haven't caught/defeated it, it attacks; 4-min re-arm after a spawn so a flee/loss gives breathing room but it keeps coming. Stops once defeated_noble_moltres is set. Spawns at its fixed town arena.

Articuno ALWAYS attacks Nifl Town after the HQ raid (proximity event, showrunner 2026-07-17): while you're in the area and haven't caught/defeated it, it attacks; 4-min re-arm after a spawn so a flee/loss gives breathing room but it keeps coming. Stops once defeated_noble_articuno is set. Spawns at its fixed town arena.

Zapdos ALWAYS attacks Cyber City after the HQ raid (proximity event, showrunner 2026-07-17): while you're in the area and haven't caught/defeated it, it attacks; 4-min re-arm after a spawn so a flee/loss gives breathing room but it keeps coming. Stops once defeated_noble_zapdos is set. Spawns at its fixed town arena.
